---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for a new script or feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to add.

## Use Case
Describe the problem this feature solves. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution
How would this work? Describe the automation/script behavior.

## Script Type
- [ ] Daily life automation
- [ ] Security/OPSEC tool
- [ ] OSINT/Research tool
- [ ] Communication helper
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Example Usage
```bash
# How would you use this?
./scripts/your-new-script.sh --example
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request.

## Humor Factor
On a scale of 1-10, how funny would this be? (We aim for useful AND entertaining)
